excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Actuarial and Investment Science lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/63032-afm-apm Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Non-local applicants must be registered as full-time students.
